name: Karthik Unni
bio: Computer Science student, AI enthusiast, and open-source builder from Kerala. I build machine learning systems, developer tools, and full-stack applications. Creator of Loom-GPT, a lightweight framework for training and experimenting with GPT-style language models, and founder of KL Dev-Ring, Kerala's builder network.

projects.name: Loom-GPT
projects.description: An open-source framework for training, fine-tuning, and experimenting with GPT-style language models on custom datasets. Designed to make language model development accessible for students, researchers, and AI builders.
